overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, elevated highways, and futuristic architecture. The character moves along a wet sidewalk past pedestrians and holographic advertisements, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077 game footage with heavy atmospheric rain and reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass spanning the street above with support pillars
building facade with horizontal yellow railings and reflective glass windows
red illuminated no entry sign on the left side of the road
tall street lamp casting light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera following a character walking along a wet red sidewalk. An elevated highway looms overhead while neon signs reflect off the pavement. The scene is sparsely populated with few pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with large digital advertisements

events.description: character passes a pedestrian in a white jacket walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a white jacket with a backpack

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket with backpack walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying colorful animated advertisements
pink neon sign with japanese characters and cherry blossom motif

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the first pedestrian, with large digital billboards becoming visible on the right side of the street. The neon pink signage illuminates the wet pavement as the character moves deeper into the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with towering digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection, passing multiple pedestrians on the sidewalk

entered.detail: cluster of large digital screens and holographic advertisements towering ahead
yellow and white zebra crossing stripes visible on the road ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the intersection, the street opens up to reveal massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements ahead. More pedestrians are visible walking in both directions, and the crosswalk markings become visible on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with vending machines and pedestrian crossing

events.description: character turns right toward the crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection to cross the wet street toward the vending machines

entered.detail: purple and red vending machines on the street corner with illuminated displays
traffic light pole with pedestrian crossing signal

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and turns right toward the crosswalk. Purple vending machines become visible on the corner as the yellow railing building moves out of view. The scene focuses on the street crossing with heavy rain continuing to fall on the neon-lit pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy cyberpunk street that transitions from a quiet, shadowed walkway into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial intersection. It begins by following a character along a wet red sidewalk beneath a looming elevated highway, where sparse pedestrians wander through the reflections of distant neon signs. As the character moves forward, the environment becomes more saturated with light, passing a lone pedestrian while large pink digital billboards begin to illuminate the damp pavement. The scene then opens up at a wide intersection, revealing massive holographic advertisements and a growing crowd of people crossing the wet asphalt. Finally, the camera turns right toward the crosswalk, shifting focus past purple vending machines as the heavy rain continues to fall on the glowing, multicolored street.
